seo.title: Cloudflare Workers implementation checklist
seo.description: A practical checklist for shipping Cloudflare Workers projects safely.

content.intro: This checklist ensures production readiness for Cloudflare Workers-based systems. Verify each item to address runtime constraints, security, performance, and AI workflow reliability.

items.title: Validate Node.js API compatibility
items.description: Check all dependencies against Cloudflare Workers' runtime limitations using https://github.com/cloudflare/workers-sdk

items.title: Configure Wrangler profile
items.description: Ensure wrangler.toml includes production routes, environment variables, and build settings for edge deployment

items.title: Test with Miniflare
items.description: Run local tests with miniflare --compatibility-date and verify against production runtime version

items.title: Set up KV namespace bindings
items.description: Confirm all KV namespaces are explicitly declared in wrangler.toml with correct environment mappings

items.title: Validate Durable Object stubs
items.description: Ensure Durable Object class definitions match production bindings and are versioned correctly

items.title: Rotate secrets via KV
items.description: Verify all credentials are stored in KV and accessed through environment variables with restricted permissions

items.title: Implement CORS policies
items.description: Configure fetch() requests with explicit CORS headers matching origin requirements

items.title: Validate JWT validation
items.description: Test JWT verification against configured public keys with expiration and audience checks

items.title: Secure AI Gateway access
items.description: Ensure AI Gateway integrations use API tokens with least-privilege roles

items.title: Test secret rotation workflow
items.description: Validate automated secret rotation process with KV versioning and zero-downtime deployment

items.title: Measure cold start latency
items.description: Test Worker initialization time with https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/platform/limits/#cold-starts

items.title: Optimize R2/D1 usage
items.description: Verify database queries use prepared statements and R2 objects are cached appropriately

items.title: Implement edge caching
items.description: Configure Cache API rules for static assets and API responses with appropriate TTLs

items.title: Profile Workers AI latency
items.description: Measure inference time with Workers AI and compare against baseline performance metrics

items.title: Test queue backpressure
items.description: Validate queue processing handles rate limiting and retry policies for high-throughput scenarios

items.title: Instrument logging
items.description: Ensure all critical paths include console.log() with structured JSON format for centralized logging

items.title: Set up metrics collection
items.description: Configure metrics endpoints for request rates, latency, and error counts using https://developers.cloudflare.com/analytics/metrics/

items.title: Validate error tracking
items.description: Test error handling for uncaught exceptions and verify error logs are captured in Cloudflare Logs

items.title: Configure alerting rules
items.description: Set up Cloudflare Alerts for critical thresholds like 5xx rates and queue backlogs

items.title: Test disaster recovery
items.description: Validate rollback procedures for Workers versions and KV data recovery processes

items.title: Validate model routing
items.description: Verify Workers AI model selection logic handles versioning and fallback strategies

items.title: Test async processing
items.description: Confirm queue-based AI inference pipelines handle retries and message acknowledgments

items.title: Monitor token usage
items.description: Implement rate limiting for AI API calls with token budget tracking

items.title: Validate structured outputs
items.description: Test JSON schema validation for Workers AI model outputs with error handling

items.title: Audit model security
items.description: Verify AI Gateway configurations prevent prompt injection and content leakage
